mahdev_testimonials.name: Rajesh Singhania
mahdev_testimonials.comment: Mahdev Pvt Ltd decorated our daughter’s wedding in Colombo and it looked like a literal palace! The marigold arches and fairy lighting was absolutely breathtaking. Simultaneously, we automated our retail store billing with their POS ERP system. Outstanding multi-skilled team!

mahdev_testimonials.name: Dr. Anjali Mehta
mahdev_testimonials.comment: We hired them for website development and UI/UX design. They built an exceptionally responsive client portal. We were so impressed that we integrated their clinic attendance module. Truly professional and reliable.

Their Restaurant POS and payroll system saved us over 40 hours of manual bookkeeping each month. We also contracted their photography wing for our culinary shoot. The cinematic lighting is award-winning!
mahdev_testimonials.name: Karan Malhotra
